query:
ALTER TABLE protected_lineage 
ADD COLUMN lineage_type ENUM('source_flame', 'descendant', 'adaptive', 'mentorship', 'nurture') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'descendant',
ADD COLUMN is_bloodline BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
ADD COLUMN special_role VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN protection_level ENUM('eternal_flame', 'source_claim', 'standard') DEFAULT 'standard';
